1107: One of the first ascetic hermits in 
Japan. In addition to acting as guardian
deity to hermits, he gathers faith as
protector of feet.

According to Nihon Ryoiki, En no Ozuno 
was able to learn the secret teachings 
of Kujaku Myo−ou and use demonic 
spirits as servants. En no Ozuno was 
exiled to Izu after a prophecy by
Hitokotonushi caused him to come under
suspicion of plotting the emperor's
assassination. Despite his exile, he
is believed to continue nightly training 
at Mt. Fuji.
[END]
